case_title: MOLINA, ALEJANDRO VS CITY AUTO SUPPLY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOLINA, ALEJANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AUTO SUPPLY ZUNIGA, ITALO ZUNIGA, JOAQUIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, ITALO
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AUTO SUPPLY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLINA, ALEJANDRO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AUTO SUPPLY ZUNIGA, ITALO ZUNIGA, JOAQUIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT SENT TO JOAQUIN ZUNIGA RETURNED SIGNED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION NEW TRIAL OR RECONSIDERATION OF APR-02-1998, OFF CALENDAR
REM: MOGEN. HRNG ON 4-2-98 = O/C, IMPROPER FILING OF MTN. DEFENDANT TO RE-FILE UNDER MOREC. FOR COURT APPROVAL BEFORE SCHEDULING.
PLAINTIFF MOLINA, ALEJANDRO FILED MOTION FOR RE- CONSIDERATION, HOLDING FOR FIFTEEN DAYS.
IT IS ORDERED THAT THE 14.00 FEE FOR MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. MOTION TO BE SEND TO COMM FOR DECISION.
PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRO MOLINA REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED 4/3/98; DENIED BY JUDGE. NOTICES SENT TO PLFT AND DEFT.
MOTION NEW TRIAL OR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLINA, ALEJANDRO HEARING SET FOR APR-02-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
